name: Wyper (Jolly Roger Foil)
effect_text: [On Play] You may place 1 Stage with a cost of 1 at the bottom of the owner's deck: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Upper Yard] or [Shandian Warrior] type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
